steps.t: The master stallion is perched upon a hill overlooking the horse-farm. He has a good vantage point from which to keep an eye on his herd. <rgb=#FF0…
The first gate is just to the east of the master, down the hill. <rgb=#FF0000>If defeated or time expires, you will return to Hengstacer Farm.&l…
The second gate is located east and a little south of the first gate. <rgb=#FF0000>If defeated or time expires, you will return to Hengstacer Fa…
The third gate is located south-east of the second gate. <rgb=#FF0000>If defeated or time expires, you will return to Hengstacer Farm.</rgb&g…
The fourth gate is located south of the third gate. <rgb=#FF0000>If defeated or time expires, you will return to Hengstacer Farm.</rgb>
The fifth gate is located south-west of the fourth gate. <rgb=#FF0000>If defeated or time expires, you will return to Hengstacer Farm.</rgb&g…
The sixth gate is located north-west of the fifth gate. <rgb=#FF0000>If defeated or time expires, you will return to Hengstacer Farm.</rgb&gt…
The seventh gate is located north of the sixth gate. <rgb=#FF0000>If defeated or time expires, you will return to Hengstacer Farm.</rgb>
The eighth gate is located north of the seventh gate. <rgb=#FF0000>If defeated or time expires, you will return to Hengstacer Farm.</rgb>
The ninth gate is located north-east of the eighth gate. <rgb=#FF0000>If defeated or time expires, you will return to Hengstacer Farm.</rgb&g…
The master is found overlooking the fields on his hill, just north of the ninth gate. <rgb=#FF0000>If defeated or time expires, you will return …
The master is found overlooking the fields on his hill, just north of the eighth gate. <rgb=#FF0000>If defeated or time expires, you will return…
